series_metadata.series_description: The Supporting Documentation of Purchase Requisitions are records created when initiating the purchasing process, authorize and provide funds for, or satisfy claims and expedite payments for private service providers including copies of purchase orders, invoice requests, receipts, agency vouchers, service reports, and other supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain onsite current fiscal year, plus 3 previous years, transfer oldest year to offsite storage, retain 2 years offsite, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 6 years, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
